recommended.name: Y Combinator Startup School
recommended.stacking_notes: Startup School deals are subset of full YC batch. Can stack SUS deals with independent applications.
recommended.notes: Free enrollment. Unlocks partial deal set including AWS $25K, Brex $75K, Notion free, Stripe waived fees even without batch acceptance.

recommended.name: Brex Startup Rewards
recommended.stacking_notes: Brex perks are additive. Brex AWS credits $1K-$5K stack with AWS Activate. Check both Brex and Ramp portals for overlapping deals.
recommended.notes: Anthropic API credits often available via Brex. 7x points on software, 3x on travel. OpenAI/Anthropic credits especially valuable for AI products.

recommended.name: Stripe Atlas Perks
recommended.stacking_notes: Atlas perks are additive to all other programs. AWS $1K Atlas perk stacks with AWS Activate Founders tier.
recommended.notes: Total perk value often 10-20x the $500 Atlas fee. Retroactive access for existing Atlas companies. Perks include AWS $1K, GCP $2K, HubSpot starter free, Gusto 6mo free, Carta $1.5K, 15+ others.

recommended.name: Techstars Startup Toolkit (Alumni Perks)
recommended.stacking_notes: Techstars acceptance unlocks $250K+ in partner perks
recommended.sponsor_warning: Requires VC/accelerator sponsor - get sponsored first or find a partner program
recommended.notes: Techstars portfolio: $250K+ in partner perks including AWS, Google, Azure, HubSpot. Requires Techstars acceptance.
recommended.confidence_reason: requires VC/accelerator sponsor - get sponsored first

recommended.name: Oregon SBDC Network
recommended.provider: Oregon Small Business Development Center Network
recommended.stacking_notes: SBDC advisors help access and stack other Oregon and federal programs. No monetary limit â€” stacks with everything.
recommended.notes: Free one-on-one business counseling and grant-writing support via 19 SBDC centers at Oregon community colleges and universities. Nevada LLC with Oregon-based operations qualifies â€” eligibility is based on business location not incorporation state. Advisors specifically help with Business Oregon grant applications and federal SBIR/STTR prep. No application required â€” schedule an appointment directly. High ROI: immediate, free, unlocks other programs.

recommended.name: Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub
recommended.stacking_notes: Azure credits + GitHub Enterprise + Azure OpenAI. One of the most valuable all-in-one programs.
recommended.notes: Includes Azure credits, GitHub Enterprise, Microsoft 365, LinkedIn Premium, Azure OpenAI access.

recommended.name: DigitalOcean Hatch
recommended.stacking_notes: Does not conflict with AWS/GCP/Azure. Can run DO workloads in parallel.
recommended.notes: ~30% acceptance rate. Stronger application with deployed product. Best value for simple VPS/containerized workloads.

recommended.name: Oracle for Startups (OCI Credits)
recommended.stacking_notes: Stacks cleanly with all major clouds. OCI Always Free tier (2 VMs, 200GB storage) is perpetual and separate from startup credits.
recommended.notes: OCI has a very generous Always Free tier that never expires. Startup program adds $10K-$300K on top. Autonomous Database free tier excellent for Postgres-compatible workloads.

recommended.name: AWS Activate
recommended.stacking_notes: Cannot stack multiple Activate tiers simultaneously; can apply new credits when prior expire
recommended.notes: Priority service for ML/AI workloads via Bedrock, SageMaker. Check current quota on model training credits.

recommended.name: Google Cloud for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Can stack Spark + Ignite if progression; Workspace for Startups can be added separately
recommended.notes: Gemini API credits often available separately via AI Startup Program at cloud.google.com/ai-startups

recommended.name: Google AI Startup Program (Vertex AI / Gemini)
recommended.stacking_notes: Separate from GCP Spark credits; specifically for Gemini API / Vertex AI
recommended.notes: Google AI Startup Program with dedicated Gemini API and Vertex AI credits. Separate from GCP startup credits.

recommended.name: SBIR / STTR Federal R&D Grants
recommended.stacking_notes: SBIR/STTR does not conflict with commercial startup programs. Many SBIR awardees also have AWS/GCP credits.
recommended.notes: Non-dilutive federal R&D grants. Phase I ~$275K, Phase II up to $1.75M. AI/ML-focused agencies (DoD, NSF, NIH) all fund software. Long cycle time (6 months) but highest non-dilutive value available. Trading Agent and Runway qualify as tech R&D.
recommended.confidence_reason: good fit but long review cycle

recommended.name: Cohere for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Stacks with all AI providers. Cohere Command and Embed models are distinct from OpenAI/Anthropic.
recommended.notes: Cohere specializes in enterprise NLP: Embed (search/RAG), Command (generation), Rerank (relevance). Strong for semantic search in BadgeTrack or document apps.

recommended.name: Algolia for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Algolia search can be augmented with Cohere semantic embeddings. Stacks with any backend.
recommended.notes: Hosted search-as-a-service. Relevant for Runway program catalog search, BadgeTrack badge discovery, and Yard Sale listing search. Sub-100ms results.

recommended.name: OVH Cloud Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Good for European data residency; GDPR-compliant
recommended.notes: Strong European cloud alternative. Bare metal and managed Kubernetes available.

recommended.name: IBM Cloud for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Best for enterprise/compliance workloads; Watson AI APIs included
recommended.notes: Good for regulated industries. IBM Watson AI credits included.

recommended.name: Neon Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Neon is serverless Postgres. Pairs well with Vercel (Edge) or Fly.io. Can replace Render Postgres.
recommended.notes: Neon is serverless, branching Postgres - direct replacement for Render Postgres. Each git branch can have its own DB branch. BadgeTrack uses Postgres already, making migration straightforward.

recommended.name: Modal Labs Startup Credits
recommended.stacking_notes: Serverless GPU inference; pay-per-second billing
recommended.notes: Serverless GPU platform for Python. Great for AI inference APIs and ML pipelines.

recommended.name: Microsoft for Startups (Azure + M365)
recommended.stacking_notes: GitHub Advanced Security + Copilot often bundled; stack with LinkedIn Learning 25 seats
recommended.notes: Azure OpenAI Service access included â€” high value for AI-native products. GitHub Copilot often bundled.

recommended.name: Groq Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Groq LPU inference is fastest available (Llama 3, Mixtral). Stacks with any other AI provider.
recommended.notes: Groq is the fastest inference provider available at 500-800 tokens/sec on Llama 3. 10B+ token/month usage makes this high-value for Trading Agent and other AI-heavy builds.

recommended.name: Render Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Best for teams already on Render (Python Flask); bridge before AWS migration
recommended.notes: For teams already using Render. Good bridge before migrating to AWS/GCP.

recommended.name: Lambda Labs GPU Cloud Startup
recommended.stacking_notes: On-demand H100/A100 clusters for training and fine-tuning
recommended.notes: On-demand GPU cloud at competitive rates. Strong H100 availability for model training.

recommended.name: Anyscale Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Ray-based distributed computing for complex ML pipelines
recommended.notes: Built on Ray framework. Best for distributed ML training and serving at scale.

recommended.name: SBA 8(a) Business Development Program
recommended.stacking_notes: 8(a) unlocks sole-source federal contracts up to $4M
recommended.notes: SBA 8(a) for disadvantaged businesses. Unlocks sole-source federal contracts. Complex application but high long-term value.

recommended.name: Hugging Face Pro Startup Credits
recommended.stacking_notes: HF Inference Endpoints startup credits; stack with compute for fine-tuning
recommended.notes: Hugging Face Pro startup credits for Inference Endpoints and Spaces compute.

recommended.name: Vercel AI Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Vercel AI SDK credits for LLM streaming and AI-powered Next.js apps
recommended.notes: Vercel AI-specific startup program with enhanced credits for AI-powered applications.

recommended.name: SendGrid Transactional Email Credits
recommended.stacking_notes: SendGrid (transactional email API) stacks with Twilio (SMS/voice) and Customer.io (marketing automation).
recommended.notes: Twilio SendGrid: 40K free emails/day on free plan, startup program unlocks Essentials. Industry standard for transactional email. Python SDK available. Separate product from Twilio SMS.

recommended.name: Atlassian Startups Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Jira + Confluence + Bitbucket bundle; can run alongside GitHub
recommended.notes: Free Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket for 10 users Year 1. 50% off Year 2.

recommended.name: Hugging Face for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Complements AWS/GCP AI credits. HF hosts open-source models while AWS/GCP provide inference infrastructure.
recommended.notes: Inference API, Spaces (GPU apps), AutoTrain (fine-tuning), private repos. Can replace paid API costs with open-source models.

recommended.name: Together AI for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Open-source model hosting platform. Stacks with all other AI APIs.
recommended.notes: Together AI runs Llama, Mistral, Qwen, and 100+ open-source models at low cost. Fine-tuning available. Good alternative when OpenAI/Anthropic budgets run out.

recommended.name: Scaleway Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Best for GPU-heavy workloads in Europe; H100 clusters available
recommended.notes: Strong GPU cloud option with H100 availability.

recommended.name: Mistral AI La Plateforme Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Stack with other LLM providers for redundancy and cost arbitrage
recommended.notes: Access to Mistral Large and Codestral. Strong EU data compliance use cases.

recommended.name: Fly.io Startup Credits
recommended.stacking_notes: Excellent direct Render replacement. Deploy Python/Flask containers globally via Dockerfile.
recommended.notes: Fly.io is the closest 1:1 replacement for Render for Python Flask apps. Supports Postgres, Redis, background workers. Free allowances on top of startup credits.

recommended.name: Fireworks AI Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Ultra-fast inference for open-source models
recommended.notes: Fast inference API for open-source models. Low-latency Llama, Mixtral hosting.

recommended.name: Ramp Corporate Card
recommended.stacking_notes: Run Ramp alongside Mercury banking. Brex and Ramp perks portals have different partner deals â€” check both.
recommended.notes: 1.5% cashback on all spend. No personal guarantee required. Perks include AWS, Stripe, Google Workspace, Gusto. Bill pay and accounting integrations.

recommended.name: Stripe Startup Discount
recommended.stacking_notes: Processing fee discounts + dedicated support; separate from Stripe Atlas
recommended.notes: Stripe startup: processing fee discounts and dedicated support. Apply via partner accelerators for best access.

recommended.name: Datadog for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Additive with cloud provider credits; operates independently
recommended.notes: Pro tier: Infrastructure monitoring (5 hosts), APM (500K traces), Logs (1GB/day). Faster with VC/accelerator endorsement.

recommended.name: Oregon Entrepreneurial Development Loan Fund (EDLF)
recommended.stacking_notes: Loan (not grant) â€” does not reduce equity but must be repaid. Stacks with all grant and credit programs.
recommended.notes: Business Oregon's EDLF provides low-interest loans ($5K-$100K) to Oregon startups and micro-enterprises that can't access conventional bank financing. Not a grant â€” must be repaid â€” but below-market interest rates and flexible terms. Oregon SBDC advisors help with the application. Nevada LLC with Oregon operations qualifies if primary business activity is in Oregon. Good bridge financing while pursuing grants and cloud credits.

recommended.name: Railway Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Simple deployment platform with GitHub integration
recommended.notes: Fast deploy platform popular with solo developers. GitHub-native workflow.

recommended.name: RunPod Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Spot GPU instances at lowest cost
recommended.notes: Cheapest GPU spot instances. Excellent for cost-conscious AI inference.

recommended.name: Salesforce for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Salesforce best for B2B with 5+ salespeople
recommended.notes: Salesforce Startup Program: discounted/free licenses for early-stage B2B.

recommended.name: Segment for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Segment as CDP collects once and routes to any analytics tool. Non-conflicting with analytics platforms â€” layer Segment under them.
recommended.notes: Unlimited sources/destinations, data replay, S3. Collect data once, send anywhere. Pipe customer events into HubSpot, BigQuery automatically.

recommended.name: GitLab for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: GitLab Ultimate includes CI/CD, SAST/DAST, container registry
recommended.notes: Free GitLab Ultimate. Advanced CI/CD, security scanning, container/package registries.

recommended.name: Zendesk for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Choose one primary support tool
recommended.notes: Free Zendesk Suite for 6 months. Ticketing, live chat, knowledge base.

recommended.name: Cloudflare Workers for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Workers, D1, R2, KV edge compute credits
recommended.notes: Extended Cloudflare for Startups: Workers, D1, R2, KV credits. Edge-first architectures.

recommended.name: Pendo Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: In-app guides + analytics; complements Intercom for onboarding
recommended.notes: Product analytics plus in-app guides and NPS. Great for B2B SaaS onboarding.

recommended.name: Business Oregon Innovation Grants
recommended.stacking_notes: State grants stack with federal SBIR/STTR and all commercial programs.
recommended.notes: Oregon-based businesses qualify for Business Oregon grant programs. The Oregon SBDC also offers free consulting and grant-writing support. Nevada LLC with Oregon-based operations may qualify for some programs.

recommended.name: Braze for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Multi-channel marketing automation; stack with Segment for data
recommended.notes: Enterprise customer engagement: email, push, SMS, in-app. High value for consumer apps.

recommended.name: Linear Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Additive with GitHub, Notion, Vercel credits
recommended.notes: Fastest approval of any program. Full Plus plan: unlimited issues, cycles, roadmaps. Free GitHub integration.

recommended.name: Auth0 / Okta for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Additive with cloud credits; handles identity layer independently
recommended.notes: 7,500 MAU free. Social login, MFA, SSO, M2M tokens, attack protection. Saves months of custom auth development.

recommended.name: Freshworks Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Full Freshworks suite: Freshdesk + Freshsales + Freshchat
recommended.notes: Full suite free Year 1. Great value bundle for solo founders.

recommended.name: Hetzner Cloud Referral Credits
recommended.stacking_notes: Best price/performance for European VPS; dev/staging environments
recommended.notes: Extremely cost-competitive European VPS. Best price/performance for non-US workloads.

recommended.name: Oregon Regional Innovation Hubs
recommended.provider: Business Oregon / Oregon Innovation Council (Oregon InC)
recommended.stacking_notes: Hubs are facilitators â€” they unlock other programs. Stacks with everything.
recommended.notes: Business Oregon and Oregon InC fund 8 regional innovation hubs statewide ($3.77M awarded 2025-2027 cycle). Hubs include Portland Metro Hub, Southern Oregon Innovation Hub, and others. Each hub provides technical assistance, investor connections, and manages local grant programs for high-growth tech companies. Nevada LLC with Oregon-based operations qualifies. Portland Metro Hub is the primary contact for Portland-area startups. Hubs also run the Oregon AI Accelerator program.

recommended.name: California IBank Innovation Hub Programs
recommended.provider: California Office of Small Business Advocate
recommended.stacking_notes: State supplement to federal programs
recommended.notes: California IBank loan guarantees and Innovation Hub programs for CA-based startups.

recommended.name: LaunchDarkly Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Feature flags integrate with deployment and monitoring pipelines.
recommended.notes: Feature flag management system. Enables safe rollouts and A/B testing without redeployments. Critical for the self-serve Runway product launch.

recommended.name: New Relic Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: New Relic full-stack APM stacks with Sentry (error tracking) and can complement Datadog.
recommended.notes: New Relic free tier is very generous: 100GB/mo data ingest free, 1 free full-access user. Startup program adds credits on top. Full APM, logs, traces, and synthetic monitoring included.

recommended.name: Snyk for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Automated dependency and container scanning
recommended.notes: Free Team plan. Scans code, containers, IaC for vulnerabilities.

recommended.name: Retool Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Connects to any database; stack with backend DB credits
recommended.notes: Build internal dashboards. Connects to Postgres, Mongo, REST APIs.

recommended.name: Twilio Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Additive with cloud provider credits; independent
recommended.notes: SendGrid (Twilio-owned) included â€” covers transactional email AND SMS in single credit pool.

recommended.name: Linode / Akamai Cloud Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Stacks with all other cloud platforms. Simple self-serve pricing; great for testing multi-region deployments.
recommended.notes: Simple VPS platform. Nanode 1GB ($5/mo) is among the cheapest ways to host Python Flask apps. Credits stretch to 50 months of base hosting.

recommended.name: Cloudflare for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Additive with cloud infrastructure credits (AWS/GCP/Azure do not overlap)
recommended.notes: Full Business plan: CDN, DDoS mitigation, Workers (10M req/day), R2 storage (10GB), Pages, Zero Trust. Zero Trust free up to 50 users.

recommended.name: Figma for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Additive with all other credits; design is independent from infra/analytics stack
recommended.notes: Full Professional plan: unlimited files, version history, Dev Mode. FigJam included for architecture diagrams.

recommended.name: Replicate Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Stacks with all other AI providers. Unique for image/video/audio generation models.
recommended.notes: Replicate specializes in image/video/audio generation models (Stable Diffusion, etc). Useful if apps need media generation capabilities.

recommended.name: RAIN Catalysts
recommended.stacking_notes: Non-dilutive; stacks with all commercial programs and other state/federal grants.
recommended.notes: RAIN (Regional Accelerator & Innovation Network) supports Oregon innovators â€” especially in underserved rural areas â€” through free workshops, venture catalyst connections, and capital access programs backed by USDA Rural Development grants. Nevada LLC with Oregon operations qualifies. Focused on Lane, Linn, Benton, Lincoln, and Grant counties but serves all of Oregon. RAIN can bridge connections to Portland Metro and statewide funding networks.

recommended.name: Anthropic Claude API Credits
recommended.stacking_notes: Credits from different sources applied sequentially. Combine with OpenAI for multi-provider AI coverage.
recommended.notes: Fastest path: Brex account (instant via portal). Watch for AI-focused accelerator cohort perks.

standalone_programs.name: Mistral AI La Plateforme Startups
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Stack with other LLM providers for redundancy and cost arbitrage
standalone_programs.notes: Access to Mistral Large and Codestral. Strong EU data compliance use cases.

standalone_programs.name: Fly.io Startup Credits
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Excellent direct Render replacement. Deploy Python/Flask containers globally via Dockerfile.
standalone_programs.notes: Fly.io is the closest 1:1 replacement for Render for Python Flask apps. Supports Postgres, Redis, background workers. Free allowances on top of startup credits.

standalone_programs.name: Fireworks AI Startup Program
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Ultra-fast inference for open-source models
standalone_programs.notes: Fast inference API for open-source models. Low-latency Llama, Mixtral hosting.

standalone_programs.name: Ramp Corporate Card
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Run Ramp alongside Mercury banking. Brex and Ramp perks portals have different partner deals â€” check both.
standalone_programs.notes: 1.5% cashback on all spend. No personal guarantee required. Perks include AWS, Stripe, Google Workspace, Gusto. Bill pay and accounting integrations.

standalone_programs.name: Stripe Startup Discount
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Processing fee discounts + dedicated support; separate from Stripe Atlas
standalone_programs.notes: Stripe startup: processing fee discounts and dedicated support. Apply via partner accelerators for best access.

standalone_programs.name: Datadog for Startups
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Additive with cloud provider credits; operates independently
standalone_programs.notes: Pro tier: Infrastructure monitoring (5 hosts), APM (500K traces), Logs (1GB/day). Faster with VC/accelerator endorsement.

standalone_programs.name: Oregon Entrepreneurial Development Loan Fund (EDLF)
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Loan (not grant) â€” does not reduce equity but must be repaid. Stacks with all grant and credit programs.
standalone_programs.notes: Business Oregon's EDLF provides low-interest loans ($5K-$100K) to Oregon startups and micro-enterprises that can't access conventional bank financing. Not a grant â€” must be repaid â€” but below-market interest rates and flexible terms. Oregon SBDC advisors help with the application. Nevada LLC with Oregon operations qualifies if primary business activity is in Oregon. Good bridge financing while pursuing grants and cloud credits.

standalone_programs.name: Railway Startup Program
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Simple deployment platform with GitHub integration
standalone_programs.notes: Fast deploy platform popular with solo developers. GitHub-native workflow.

standalone_programs.name: RunPod Startup Program
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Spot GPU instances at lowest cost
standalone_programs.notes: Cheapest GPU spot instances. Excellent for cost-conscious AI inference.

standalone_programs.name: Salesforce for Startups
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Salesforce best for B2B with 5+ salespeople
standalone_programs.notes: Salesforce Startup Program: discounted/free licenses for early-stage B2B.

standalone_programs.name: Segment for Startups
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Segment as CDP collects once and routes to any analytics tool. Non-conflicting with analytics platforms â€” layer Segment under them.
standalone_programs.notes: Unlimited sources/destinations, data replay, S3. Collect data once, send anywhere. Pipe customer events into HubSpot, BigQuery automatically.

standalone_programs.name: GitLab for Startups
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: GitLab Ultimate includes CI/CD, SAST/DAST, container registry
standalone_programs.notes: Free GitLab Ultimate. Advanced CI/CD, security scanning, container/package registries.

standalone_programs.name: Zendesk for Startups
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Choose one primary support tool
standalone_programs.notes: Free Zendesk Suite for 6 months. Ticketing, live chat, knowledge base.

standalone_programs.name: Cloudflare Workers for Startups
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Workers, D1, R2, KV edge compute credits
standalone_programs.notes: Extended Cloudflare for Startups: Workers, D1, R2, KV credits. Edge-first architectures.

standalone_programs.name: Pendo Startup Program
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: In-app guides + analytics; complements Intercom for onboarding
standalone_programs.notes: Product analytics plus in-app guides and NPS. Great for B2B SaaS onboarding.

standalone_programs.name: Business Oregon Innovation Grants
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: State grants stack with federal SBIR/STTR and all commercial programs.
standalone_programs.notes: Oregon-based businesses qualify for Business Oregon grant programs. The Oregon SBDC also offers free consulting and grant-writing support. Nevada LLC with Oregon-based operations may qualify for some programs.

standalone_programs.name: Braze for Startups
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Multi-channel marketing automation; stack with Segment for data
standalone_programs.notes: Enterprise customer engagement: email, push, SMS, in-app. High value for consumer apps.

standalone_programs.name: Linear Startup Program
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Additive with GitHub, Notion, Vercel credits
standalone_programs.notes: Fastest approval of any program. Full Plus plan: unlimited issues, cycles, roadmaps. Free GitHub integration.

standalone_programs.name: Auth0 / Okta for Startups
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Additive with cloud credits; handles identity layer independently
standalone_programs.notes: 7,500 MAU free. Social login, MFA, SSO, M2M tokens, attack protection. Saves months of custom auth development.

standalone_programs.name: Freshworks Startup Program
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Full Freshworks suite: Freshdesk + Freshsales + Freshchat
standalone_programs.notes: Full suite free Year 1. Great value bundle for solo founders.

standalone_programs.name: Hetzner Cloud Referral Credits
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Best price/performance for European VPS; dev/staging environments
standalone_programs.notes: Extremely cost-competitive European VPS. Best price/performance for non-US workloads.

standalone_programs.name: Oregon Regional Innovation Hubs
standalone_programs.provider: Business Oregon / Oregon Innovation Council (Oregon InC)
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Hubs are facilitators â€” they unlock other programs. Stacks with everything.
standalone_programs.notes: Business Oregon and Oregon InC fund 8 regional innovation hubs statewide ($3.77M awarded 2025-2027 cycle). Hubs include Portland Metro Hub, Southern Oregon Innovation Hub, and others. Each hub provides technical assistance, investor connections, and manages local grant programs for high-growth tech companies. Nevada LLC with Oregon-based operations qualifies. Portland Metro Hub is the primary contact for Portland-area startups. Hubs also run the Oregon AI Accelerator program.

standalone_programs.name: California IBank Innovation Hub Programs
standalone_programs.provider: California Office of Small Business Advocate
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: State supplement to federal programs
standalone_programs.notes: California IBank loan guarantees and Innovation Hub programs for CA-based startups.

standalone_programs.name: LaunchDarkly Startup Program
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Feature flags integrate with deployment and monitoring pipelines.
standalone_programs.notes: Feature flag management system. Enables safe rollouts and A/B testing without redeployments. Critical for the self-serve Runway product launch.

standalone_programs.name: New Relic Startup Program
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: New Relic full-stack APM stacks with Sentry (error tracking) and can complement Datadog.
standalone_programs.notes: New Relic free tier is very generous: 100GB/mo data ingest free, 1 free full-access user. Startup program adds credits on top. Full APM, logs, traces, and synthetic monitoring included.

standalone_programs.name: Snyk for Startups
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Automated dependency and container scanning
standalone_programs.notes: Free Team plan. Scans code, containers, IaC for vulnerabilities.

standalone_programs.name: Retool Startup Program
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Connects to any database; stack with backend DB credits
standalone_programs.notes: Build internal dashboards. Connects to Postgres, Mongo, REST APIs.

standalone_programs.name: Twilio Startup Program
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Additive with cloud provider credits; independent
standalone_programs.notes: SendGrid (Twilio-owned) included â€” covers transactional email AND SMS in single credit pool.

standalone_programs.name: Linode / Akamai Cloud Startup Program
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Stacks with all other cloud platforms. Simple self-serve pricing; great for testing multi-region deployments.
standalone_programs.notes: Simple VPS platform. Nanode 1GB ($5/mo) is among the cheapest ways to host Python Flask apps. Credits stretch to 50 months of base hosting.

standalone_programs.name: Cloudflare for Startups
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Additive with cloud infrastructure credits (AWS/GCP/Azure do not overlap)
standalone_programs.notes: Full Business plan: CDN, DDoS mitigation, Workers (10M req/day), R2 storage (10GB), Pages, Zero Trust. Zero Trust free up to 50 users.

standalone_programs.name: Figma for Startups
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Additive with all other credits; design is independent from infra/analytics stack
standalone_programs.notes: Full Professional plan: unlimited files, version history, Dev Mode. FigJam included for architecture diagrams.

standalone_programs.name: Replicate Startup Program
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Stacks with all other AI providers. Unique for image/video/audio generation models.
standalone_programs.notes: Replicate specializes in image/video/audio generation models (Stable Diffusion, etc). Useful if apps need media generation capabilities.

standalone_programs.name: RAIN Catalysts
standalone_programs.stacking_notes: Non-dilutive; stacks with all commercial programs and other state/federal grants.
standalone_programs.notes: RAIN (Regional Accelerator & Innovation Network) supports Oregon innovators â€” especially in underserved rural areas â€” through free workshops, venture catalyst connections, and capital access programs backed by USDA Rural Development grants. Nevada LLC with Oregon operations qualifies. Focused on Lane, Linn, Benton, Lincoln, and Grant counties but serves all of Oregon. RAIN can bridge connections to Portland Metro and statewide funding networks.

locked_programs.name: Anthropic Claude API Credits
locked_programs.stacking_notes: Credits from different sources applied sequentially. Combine with OpenAI for multi-provider AI coverage.
locked_programs.notes: Fastest path: Brex account (instant via portal). Watch for AI-focused accelerator cohort perks.
locked_programs.confidence_reason: strong match; get gateway enrolled first

locked_programs.name: 500 Global Portfolio Startup Perks
locked_programs.stacking_notes: 500 Global portfolio perks include major cloud and SaaS discounts
locked_programs.sponsor_warning: Requires VC/accelerator sponsor - get sponsored first or find a partner program
locked_programs.notes: 500 Global portfolio: $100K+ in partner perks. Strong MENA, SEA, LATAM networks.
locked_programs.confidence_reason: requires VC/accelerator sponsor - get sponsored first

stacking_opportunities.value_note: ~$104K+ in cloud credits with no conflicts
stacking_opportunities.notes: Run DO workloads alongside AWS/GCP/Azure. All four stack cleanly.

stacking_opportunities.value_note: Multi-provider AI coverage: Anthropic + OpenAI + Azure OpenAI + HuggingFace open-source
stacking_opportunities.notes: Fastest path: Brex (instant) - Azure (self-apply) - YC SUS - accelerator.
Atlas adds AWS $1K, GCP $2K, HubSpot free, Gusto 6mo, Carta $1.5K on top of direct applications.

stacking_opportunities.value_note: Free enrollment unlocks AWS $25K, Brex $75K, Cloudflare, PostHog
stacking_opportunities.notes: Apply YC SUS first (free, instant). Unlocks partial deal set immediately.

stacking_opportunities.value_note: ~$12K+ in build/deploy/track tooling at near-zero cash outlay
Treasury (Mercury/Relay) + Spend rewards (Brex/Ramp) + Partner perk portals
stacking_opportunities.notes: Mercury = primary treasury. Relay = operational sub-accounts. Brex/Ramp = card rewards. All four stack cleanly.
